title: Move methodology docs out of the Instance repo root
description: Stamped docs (CONTEXT.md, PHILOSOPHY.md, PROCESS.md, TEAM_DIRECTIVE.md, schemas/) clutter a host project's root and can collide with existing files. Decide a namespaced location, update template/, cli.js, and every cross-reference (SKILL.md, agent defs, README). The restored ADR location (PRD-001) rides on this outcome.
notes: Raised by Team Lead during the Setup Grill dogfood. Decision resolved by ADR-0002 (.excn/adr/0002-excn-namespace.md, alignment PASS); implementation superseded by PRD-003 issue set EXEC-018…022.
